purpose: Addendum round A1 — live verification of the publication-anchored VL activation fix (commit 100f2af) plus sidecar recovery from stopped Modal endpoints on the new images

vl_activation_assertion.pre_fix_reference: round 306 effective 07:31:12 was ~6 min PAST at its 07:37+ distribution
vl_activation_assertion.verdict: PASS - activation anchored to publication, blob distributed as pending

sidecar_recovery.initial_state: all three sidecars started with Modal apps stopped by operator; deployment records stale
sidecar_recovery.operator_action: deploy-modal one-shot on all three hosts (records rewritten 17:48:30-17:48:46)
sidecar_recovery.outcome: all three re-scored within the open commit window, committed and revealed; tzeentch commit 3D4EC80C93EAE89955FFA94C58F26E79B46096B601EE525D1156E7BCA098D183, reveal 49E432AC0383D7D3EA1C2D5730F06832D156C1AF8E6811E450F20C504D22A783

observations: rounds API does not expose output_publication_commit_closes_at/due_at (DB has them); sidecar deadline capping relies on its own recorded announcement windows - noted, not fixed in this run

postfiat.org CDN still served sequence 298 several minutes after the Pages commit; devnet's 7.2-min lookahead is tight against scheduler tick + Pages propagation (testnet's 30 min absorbs this) - noted, not fixed in this run
